title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.1110 - Employee's right of appeal, record of termination or suspension to be closed records
text:
105.1110.  Employee's right of appeal, record of termination or suspension to be closed records. — Any public employee who is suspended or dismissed under the provisions of section 105.1105 or 105.1108 shall have the right to appeal as provided under section 36.390 or under any appeal rights established by a public employer not subject to the provisions of chapter 36 that are substantially similar to the rights established under section 36.390.  Personnel records of any public employee relating to suspension or termination for reasons specified in section 105.1105 or 105.1108 shall be closed records.
(L. 1993 S.B. 67 § 5)
